e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 or /dev/ttyAMA0. Must: e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 or /dev/ttyAMA0. Must be readable by the ioBroker process.
Panasonic Aquarea always uses 9600 8E1. Only change it if there is a specific reason to.
How often to query the heat pump. Heisha: How often to query the heat pump. HeishaMon defaults to 5 seconds.
Poll the extra data block (K/L series on: Poll the extra data block (K/L series only)
Adds 6 additional 16-bit energy datapoin: Adds 6 additional 16-bit energy datapoints. Only enable this on a K/L series heat pump — older models do not provide these values, so each extra poll would just time out.
Send optional-PCB poll frames (not yet i: Send optional-PCB poll frames (not yet implemented)
Reserved for future SG-Ready / external: Reserved for future SG-Ready / external thermostat support.
Do not send any polls or set commands. D: Do not send any polls or set commands. Decode and store frames sent by another master on the bus (e.g. a HeishaMon running in parallel).
Wait time after each frame before the ne: Wait time after each frame before the next one may be sent. Prevents collisions when multiple set-commands run in parallel. Default 200 ms — only increase it if communication problems occur.
Logs every set-command frame and the hea: Logs every set-command frame and the heat pump's reply (type, timing, hexdump) at info level. Useful for reverse-engineering the protocol. Off by default to keep the log clean.
